posts.raw_content:
Seriously. 

We need constitutional carry in every state. If you can legally own a gun in Texas you should be able to bring it anywhere in the US. 

No more ridiculous prohibited features such as standard magazine capacity. It's wild to think that a magazine I'm allowed to have can get me put in a cell in another state. 

We all know gun laws are intentional cucking of the citizen to ensure we never rise up against the establishment. It's never about safety and these people aren't dumb. Yet our MAGA government has done nothing. We are always getting fucked by RINOs and MIGA fake American First snakes.
